_comment: Audit map: matches generated PNGs in 'Fotos roly home/' to manifest slots. 'source' is a unique timestamp token resolved by substring match against the PNG filenames. Built 2026-06-15.

notes.color_lab: Kept existing same-house renders color_navy_cream/sage_charcoal/white_bronze.webp; generated set has no true same-house triptych. Not QA-gated (section pack).
